query:
-- 删除错误的partnerId=30002记录
DELETE FROM partner_cities WHERE partnerId = 30002;

-- 更新正确的partnerId=120001记录的contractStatus为active
UPDATE partner_cities 
SET contractStatus = 'active'
WHERE partnerId = 120001;

-- 验证修复结果
SELECT pc.partnerId, p.name, p.phone, c.name as cityName, pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.phone = '15321700153';
